_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: OpenRune Central Server
author: OpenRune
description:
OpenRune Central (HTTP APIs + world-link TCP).

Set DB, HTTP port, and jav_config overrides in Startup variables (writes central-config.yaml). Auto-updates scripts from GitHub. Console: !help, stop, refresh …

variables.name: Server JAR file
variables.description: Filename of the uploaded Central server JAR in /home/container.

variables.name: JVM Extra Flags
variables.description: Additional JVM flags (e.g. -Xmx512M)

variables.name: Write central-config.yaml
variables.description: Generate central-config.yaml from the variables below on each start (1 = yes, 0 = use uploaded file only).

variables.name: HTTP port
variables.description: Ktor HTTP port (world list, jav_config, admin). Match your public URL / Cloudflare tunnel target.

variables.name: Database host
variables.description: PostgreSQL hostname (used if JDBC URL is empty).

variables.name: Database port
variables.description: PostgreSQL port.

variables.name: Database name
variables.description: PostgreSQL database name.

variables.name: Database user
variables.description: PostgreSQL user.

variables.name: Database password
variables.description: PostgreSQL password.

variables.name: Database pool size
variables.description: Hikari maximum pool size (1–100).

variables.name: JDBC URL (optional)
variables.description: Full JDBC URL override. If set, host/port/name are ignored.

variables.name: Session TTL (ms)
variables.description: Stale session sweep TTL in milliseconds.

variables.name: World-link TCP port
variables.description: World server auth port (0 or false to disable).

variables.name: Jav config revision
variables.description: Remote jav_config revision (jav_local_%d.ws).

variables.name: Jav config overrides
variables.description: Paste jav_config.ws lines to override (one per line): title=…, codebase=…, param=25=…, msg=ok=…

variables.name: Enable Auto-Update
variables.description: Check GitHub for newer deploy/pterodactyl scripts on startup (1 = on, 0 = off).

variables.name: Force Auto-Update
variables.description: Apply script updates without prompting (1 = auto, 0 = notify only).

variables.name: Auto-Update Branch
variables.description: Git branch for script sync (default main).

variables.name: Enable Logcleaner Module
variables.description: Clean logs/tmp from the previous run before starting (1 = on, 0 = off).

variables.name: Enable Cloudflare Tunnel
variables.description: Start cloudflared on boot and enable HTTPS via Cloudflare (0 = off, 1 = on).

variables.name: Cloudflared Tunnel Token
variables.description: Tunnel run token from Cloudflare (Zero Trust → Networks → Tunnels → Install connector).
